Package org.key_project.slicing

Class RuleStatistics

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.slicing.RuleStatistics
public class RuleStatistics extends Object
Simple data object to store a mapping of rules to various counters.

    • RuleStatistics

      public RuleStatistics()

  • Method Details

    • addApplication

      public void addApplication(Rule rule, boolean branches)
      Register one rule application (proof step).
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule
      branches - whether this rule application creates new proof branches

    • addUselessApplication

      public void addUselessApplication(Rule rule, boolean branches)
      Register a useless rule application (proof step).
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule
      branches - whether this rule application creates new proof branches

    • addInitialUselessApplication

      public void addInitialUselessApplication(Rule rule, boolean branches)
      Register an "initial useless" rule application (proof step).
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule
      branches - whether this rule application creates new proof branches

    • sortBy

      public List<Quadruple<String,Integer,Integer,Integer>> sortBy(Comparator<Quadruple<String,Integer,Integer,Integer>> comparator)
      Get the total counts sorted by a comparison function. The comparator receives: the rule name, the number of rule applications, the number of useless applications and the number of "initial useless" applications.
      Parameters:
      comparator - custom comparator
      Returns:
      list of rule names + counters

    • branches

      public boolean branches(String rule)
      Parameters:
      rule - rule display name
      Returns:
      whether that rule creates new branches
